summary: A modern, fully responsive professional healthcare website — CARE HOSPITAL APPOINTMENT BOOKING SYSTEM — built with React.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and React Router. Features a glassmorphism sticky navbar, animated hero section, doctors grid, departments section, appointment booking form, features section, contact section with map, and a multi-column footer. Medical theme with white, blue, and light green gradients.
architectural_notes: Frontend: React.js with React Router for routing
Styling: Tailwind CSS with Framer Motion for animations
Design: White + Blue + Light Green medical theme, Poppins/Inter font, mobile-first responsive
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Professional medical illustration showing a friendly doctor in a white coat with a stethoscope, standing next to a hospital building, clean flat-style vector art with blue and light green tones (hero-doctor.dim_600x500.png)
- CARE HOSPITAL circular logo icon with a red cross medical symbol and teal/blue color scheme, flat minimal design (care-hospital-logo.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a sticky glassmorphism header with the CARE HOSPITAL logo (icon + text) on the left, navigation links (Home, About, Doctors, Departments, Book Appointment, Contact) in the center/right, and Login, Register, and Emergency (highlighted red) buttons on the right. Include a mobile hamburger menu that opens a smooth slide-in drawer.

Build an animated hero section with the headline 'Your Health, Our Priority', subtext 'Book appointments with top doctors instantly.', two CTA buttons ('Book Appointment' primary and 'View Doctors' secondary), and a doctor/hospital illustration image on the right side. Use Framer Motion for entrance animations.

Create a Doctors section with a 3-column grid (responsive) displaying doctor cards. Each card shows a doctor photo, name, specialization, years of experience, star rating display, and a 'Book Now' button. Include at least 6 sample doctors with varied specializations.

Build a Departments section with animated hover cards for: Cardiology, Neurology, Orthopedics, Pediatrics, Dermatology, and General Medicine. Each card should include a relevant icon and animate on hover using Framer Motion.

Implement an appointment booking form section with fields: Patient Name, Email, Phone, Select Doctor (dropdown), Select Department (dropdown), Date Picker, and Time Slot selector. Include client-side field validation and display a success message upon valid form submission. Store submitted appointments in the backend.

Add a Features section displaying 4 animated feature cards: '24/7 Emergency Support', 'Experienced Doctors', 'Online Reports', and 'Easy Appointment Booking'. Each card should include a relevant icon and a brief description, with Framer Motion animations on scroll.

Build a Contact section with a Google Maps iframe embed showing a sample hospital location, contact details (address, phone, email, working hours), and a quick contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields.

Create a professional multi-column footer with a dark blue background and white text. Include 4 columns: (1) About Hospital with links for About Us, Our Services, Careers, Blog; (2) Quick Links for Book Appointment, Find Doctor, Departments, Emergency; (3) Contact Info with address, phone, email, working hours; (4) Social Media icons for Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn. Include a bottom bar with '© 2026 CARE HOSPITAL. All Rights Reserved.' and Privacy Policy / Terms & Conditions links.

Apply a consistent medical design theme across the entire application: white, blue, and light green gradient color palette; Poppins or Inter font; soft shadows and rounded cards; smooth hover effects on interactive elements; and fully mobile-first responsive layout with no overflow issues.

new_feature_requests.summary: Sticky glassmorphism header with logo, nav links, login/register/emergency buttons, and mobile hamburger drawer
Animated hero section with headline, subtext, two CTA buttons, and doctor/hospital illustration
Doctors section with 3-column grid cards showing image, name, specialization, experience, rating, and Book Now button
Departments section with animated hover cards for Cardiology, Neurology, Orthopedics, Pediatrics, Dermatology, General Medicine
Appointment booking form with patient details, doctor/department selectors, date picker, time slot, validation, and success message
Features section with 4 animated cards: 24/7 Emergency, Experienced Doctors, Online Reports, Easy Booking
Contact section with Google Map embed, contact details, and quick contact form
Multi-column footer with About, Quick Links, Contact Info, Social Media columns, dark blue background, and copyright line

Implement a Motoko backend actor to store and retrieve appointment bookings. The actor should expose functions to: submit a new appointment (with patient name, email, phone, doctor, department, date, time slot), retrieve all appointments, and retrieve appointments by email.
